docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY CUEVAS, JESSE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $55.00 SERVED APR-15-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-27-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DOLORES BASTIAN DALTON. THE PROOF OF SERVICE (CERTIFIED MAIL) MUST BE SENT/SERVED TO THE PROPER AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JESSE CUEVAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CUEVAS, JESSE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JESSE CUEVAS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES,INC. IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 06/24/2025.SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 02/24/2025. SMALLLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMTPTED-NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
